scope: Progressive authoring queue for promoting source-companion pages into authored publication pages without exposing internal drafts or weakening citation requirements.

stageDefinitions.label: Demand And Gap Driven
stageDefinitions.rule: Promote source companions that already have routed demand, gap links, or unresolved review pressure.

stageDefinitions.label: Fold Into Existing Authored Pages
stageDefinitions.rule: Attach source companions to nearby authored pages when the public page already exists.

stageDefinitions.label: Promote Remaining Source Companions
stageDefinitions.rule: Create new authored source maps or reference pages for companions without a public target.

stageDefinitions.label: Final Candidate Review
stageDefinitions.rule: Review authored candidates for operator, source-refresh, and editorial flags before publication.
